ham: Hello, this is an automated message from XYZ Broadband. Your scheduled engineer visit for router upgrade is confirmed for 12th May 2024 at 10:30 AM. Please ensure someone is available to provide access. If you need to reschedule, reply WITHDRAW. Thank you.
spam: CONGRATS!!! you are the lucky winer of the mega KBC prize. You have won INR 5,000,000. To claim, you must send your bank account details via <URL> and pay a processing fee of INR 500. Hurry, offer ends in 24 hrs! REPLY YES to claim.
